message.content:
Redesign the sidebar at `/Users/admin/it-asset/components/layout/sidebar.tsx` for a professional enterprise feel. Read the file first before editing. ## Changes ### 1. Add navigation section groups Group the nav items with subtle section headers. Add a `section` field to nav items: ```typescript type NavSection = "main" | "work" | "manage" | "data" // Each nav item gets a section field: const navItems: (NavItem & { section: NavSection })[] = [ // main section { label: "首页", href: "/home", icon: LayoutDashboard, roles: [...], section: "main" }, { label: "AI 助手", href: "/chat", icon: Bot, roles: [...], section: "main" }, { label: "通知中心", href: "/notifications", icon: Bell, roles: [...], section: "main" }, // work section { label: "我的资产", href: "/my-assets", icon: Laptop, roles: [...], section: "work" }, { label: "申领设备", href: "/apply", icon: ClipboardPlus, roles: [...], section: "work" }, { label: "我的工单", href: "/tickets", icon: Ticket, roles: [...], section: "work" }, { label: "审批工作台", href: "/approvals", icon: CheckSquare, roles: ["MANAGER"], section: "work" }, // manage section { label: "IT 工作台", href: "/it/home", icon: Wrench, roles: ["IT_ADMIN"], section: "manage" }, { label: "工单工作台", href: "/it/tickets", icon: Ticket, roles: ["IT_ADMIN"], section: "manage" }, { label: "资产管理", href: "/it/assets", icon: Package, roles: ["IT_ADMIN"], section: "manage" }, { label: "型号管理", href: "/it/models", icon: Archive, roles: ["IT_ADMIN"], section: "manage" }, { label: "入库操作", href: "/it/inbound", icon: Boxes, roles: ["IT_ADMIN"], section: "manage" }, { label: "盘点", href: "/it/inventory", icon: ClipboardList, roles: ["IT_ADMIN"], section: "manage" }, { label: "用户管理", href: "/it/users", icon: Users, roles: ["IT_ADMIN"], section: "manage" }, { label: "审计日志", href: "/it/audit", icon: FileText, roles: ["IT_ADMIN"], section: "manage" }, // data section { label: "部门看板", href: "/dept-board", icon: BarChart3, roles: ["MANAGER"], section: "data" }, { label: "资产大屏", href: "/exec/dashboard", icon: PieChart, roles: ["EXECUTIVE"], section: "data" }, { label: "AI 洞察", href: "/exec/insights", icon: Lightbulb, roles: ["EXECUTIVE"], section: "data" }, { label: "个人设置", href: "/profile", icon: Settings, roles: [...], section: "data" }, ] ``` Section labels (show in Chinese): - `main` → no header (these are the primary items) - `work` → "工作" - `manage` → "管理" - `data` → "数据" Render section headers as subtle text above their group: ```tsx {currentSection !== lastSection && (
{sectionLabel}
)} ``` Only show section headers when NOT collapsed. ### 2. Active state redesign Change the active nav item from `bg-sidebar-accent` to a more sophisticated indicator: - Active item gets a left border accent: `border-l-2 border-primary` - Plus a subtle background: `bg-sidebar-accent` - When collapsed (no left border since it's centered), use a subtle ring or different bg ```tsx className={cn( "flex items-center gap-3 rounded-md px-2 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-150", "hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground", isActive ? "bg-sidebar-accent text-sidebar-accent-foreground border-l-2 border-primary pl-1.5" : "text-sidebar-foreground/70 border-l-2 border-transparent pl-1.5", collapsed && "justify-center px-0 py-2 border-l-0 pl-0", )} ``` ### 3. Brand area polish - The IT logo box: add a subtle gradient background using `bg-linear-to-br from-primary to-primary/80` in the logo `div` - Keep the text part as is ### 4. Keep the role switcher but make it more subtle - Remove the "角色调试" label - Make the buttons even smaller if needed - Keep at the bottom as before ## Important - Read the COMPLETE file before any edits - The nav items type should include the section field - Make sure the section grouping logic works correctly when items are filtered by role - After all edits, verify no syntax errors by reading the file back

- day-one-patch
- miniprogram-development: WeChat Mini Program development skill for building, debugging, previewing, testing, publishing, and optimizing mini program projects. This skill should be used when users ask to create, develop, modify, debug, preview, test, deploy, publish, launch, review, or optimize WeChat Mini Programs, mini program pages, components, `tabBar`, routing, navigation, icon assets, project structure, project configuration, `project.config.json`, `appid` setup, device preview, real-device validation, WeChat Developer Tools workflows, `miniprogram-ci` preview/upload flows, or mini program release processes. It should also be used when users explicitly mention CloudBase, `wx.cloud`, Tencent CloudBase, 腾讯云开发, or 云开发 in a mini program project.
- ui-ux-pro-max: UI/UX design intelligence for web and mobile. Includes 50+ styles, 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, 161 product types, 99 UX guidelines, and 25 chart types across 10 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, and HTML/CSS). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, and check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, and mobile app. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, and chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, and flat design. Topics: color systems, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, interaction states, shadow, and gradient. Integrations: shadcn/ui MCP for component search and examples.

- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init
- review
- security-review

content.thinking: All done. Let me summarize the changes made.

content.text:
All changes are complete. Here is a summary of what was done to `/Users/admin/it-asset/components/layout/sidebar.tsx`:

**Changes applied:**

1. **NavSection type system** -- Removed the ad-hoc `group?: string` field. Added `type NavSection = "main" | "work" | "manage" | "data"` and a `SECTION_LABELS` lookup map. Each nav item now carries a typed `section` field.

2. **Nav items reordered and grouped** -- Items are now ordered by section: main (首页, AI助手, 通知中心), work (我的资产, 申领设备, 我的工单, 审批工作台), manage (IT工作台 through 审计日志), data (部门看板, 资产大屏, AI洞察, 个人设置). `filterNavItems` and its callers updated accordingly.

3. **Section headers** -- Subtle section headers ("工作", "管理", "数据") rendered above their groups with `text-[11px] font-medium text-sidebar-foreground/35 uppercase tracking-wider`. Headers only appear when not collapsed and when the section transitions. The `main` section has no header.

4. **Active state redesign** -- Active links now get `border-l-2 border-primary pl-1.5` (left accent bar) plus `bg-sidebar-accent`. Inactive links get `border-l-2 border-transparent pl-1.5` for consistent alignment. When collapsed: `border-l-0 pl-0` since the left accent does not apply.

5. **Brand logo polish** -- The IT logo box now uses `bg-linear-to-br from-primary to-primary/80 text-sidebar-primary-foreground` for a subtle gradient instead of the flat `bg-sidebar-primary`. Brand text (资产管理系统, department, name) kept as original.

6. **Role switcher refinement** -- Removed the "角色调试" label. Kept the role switcher at the bottom with a `<Separator />` divider, using the same compact button styling as before.
